subject: Project pulse: rollout execution in Canberra | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-3761
body: Following yesterday's call, the rollout effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. Publish a draft checklist for approvals, compliance, and rollout. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Albert Einstein and Marie Curie. Reference initiative INIT-3761. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning.
